note: UPDATE INSTRUCTIONS: When a round happens, update last_round_date. If a state announces an upcoming date, add announced_date and set status to 'announced'. Remove announced_date when round passes. Everything recalculates automatically.

federal_189.label: 189 Federal — SkillSelect
federal_189.last_round_note: 10,000 invitations. Tier 1 healthcare at 75pts, trades at 65pts, ICT/accounting at 90-95pts.
federal_189.offshore_note: 189 is open to all applicants regardless of location
federal_189.frequency_note: DHA moved to quarterly model 2025-26. Rounds expected ~4 times per year.

states.label: South Australia
states.last_round_note: Talent & Innovation stream reopened. General stream active.
states.offshore_note: SA accepts offshore applicants across most streams
states.frequency_note: SA runs monthly rounds — most consistent state

states.label: Tasmania
states.last_round_note: Weekly rounds. Chef, nurse, teacher, IT nominated.
states.offshore_note: TAS requires 6-9 months living and working in TAS before applying
states.frequency_note: TAS runs weekly — fastest state in Australia

states.label: Victoria
states.last_round_note: Engineers, teachers, nurses, software developers invited. Construction priority.
states.offshore_note: VIC included offshore applicants in March round for priority occupations

states.label: Queensland
states.last_round_note: Healthcare, engineering, trades. ROI system — register early.
states.offshore_note: QLD actively accepts offshore applicants — one of the most offshore-friendly states

states.label: Australian Capital Territory
states.last_round_note: Canberra Matrix round. ICT, education, health. All ACT is regional-eligible for 491.
states.offshore_note: ACT Matrix requires demonstrated connection to Canberra — employment or study preferred
states.frequency_note: ACT runs irregularly based on Matrix scoring — roughly every 6-10 weeks

states.label: New South Wales
states.last_round_note: Merit-based selection. Construction, renewables, digital economy, healthcare.
states.offshore_note: NSW requires applicants to be NSW residents or overseas — not interstate onshore applicants

states.label: Western Australia
states.last_round_note: Healthcare, mining/resources engineering, trades. Job offer required for most streams.
states.offshore_note: WA accepts offshore applicants but typically requires a WA job offer

states.label: Northern Territory
states.last_round_note: Healthcare, trades, education. Least competitive state. NT commitment required.
states.offshore_note: NT accepts offshore applicants. Must commit to live and work in NT.
states.frequency_note: NT runs irregularly — roughly every 8-12 weeks
